programs.title: Killer Couples
programs.desc: When a beloved grandmother falls victim to a brutal crime, the search for her killers reveals a torrid romance between two young lovers willing to do anything to get what they desire.

programs.title: Killer Couples
programs.desc: The unexplained disappearances of a young mother and her two sons in 1980 lead investigators on a three-decade quest for justice, exposing multiple murders and a homicidal love affair that left untold suffering and carnage in its wake.

programs.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programs.desc: A loving couple are found shot to death in their home, forcing police to pursue a pair of desperate lovers on a cross-country manhunt.

programs.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programs.sub_title: Lori Smith & Eric Rubio and Amy Stevens & Paul Smith
programs.desc: When a young woman is found tortured and killed after a camping trip with friends, police must unravel two couples' conflicting stories of depravity to bring her killers to justice.

programs.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programs.desc: After two best friends are reported missing, Texas and Minnesota police team up to bring a suspected serial killer to justice; an accomplice shares her side of the story from behind bars, revealing chilling details of the crime.

programs.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programs.desc: When a young soldier goes missing just two days after his wedding, authorities fear the worst has occurred in their small Ohio town. Rumors of a sordid affair lead to a shocking betrayal that ended in not one, but two horrific crimes.
